'''âw-n-v''' ('''kawanav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:heaf|heaf]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-n-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:heaf|heaf]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-n-v
|-
! Lemma
| kawanav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwanav|thiwanav]] || [[word:jiwanav|jiwanav]] || [[word:shiwanav|shiwanav]] || [[word:kiwanav|kiwanav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwanav|thuthuwanav]] || [[word:jujuwanav|jujuwanav]] || [[word:shushuwanav|shushuwanav]] || [[word:kukuwanav|kukuwanav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwanav|thuwanav]] || [[word:juwanav|juwanav]] || [[word:shuwanav|shuwanav]] || [[word:kuwanav|kuwanav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwanav|thuwanav]] || [[word:juwanav|juwanav]] || [[word:shuwanav|shuwanav]] || [[word:kuwanav|kuwanav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewanav|thewanav]] || [[word:jewanav|jewanav]] || [[word:shewanav|shewanav]] || [[word:kewanav|kewanav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowanav|thothowanav]] || [[word:jojowanav|jojowanav]] || [[word:shoshowanav|shoshowanav]] || [[word:kokowanav|kokowanav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowanav|thowanav]] || [[word:jowanav|jowanav]] || [[word:showanav|showanav]] || [[word:kowanav|kowanav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowanav|thowanav]] || [[word:jowanav|jowanav]] || [[word:showanav|showanav]] || [[word:kowanav|kowanav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwanav|thĂŠwanav]] || [[word:jĂŠwanav|jĂŠwanav]] || [[word:shĂŠwanav|shĂŠwanav]] || [[word:kĂŠwanav|kĂŠwanav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawanav|thathawanav]] || [[word:jajawanav|jajawanav]] || [[word:shashawanav|shashawanav]] || [[word:kakawanav|kakawanav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawanav|thawanav]] || [[word:jawanav|jawanav]] || [[word:shawanav|shawanav]] || [[word:kawanav|kawanav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawanav|thawanav]] || [[word:jawanav|jawanav]] || [[word:shawanav|shawanav]] || [[word:kawanav|kawanav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawanav|shawanav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawanav|goshawanav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawanav|gokishawanav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawanavnĂŒ|shawanavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawanavnknĂŒ|goshawanavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawanavnĂŒ|gokishawanavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawanavshĂ«|shawanavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawanavnkshĂ«|goshawanavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawanavshĂ«|gokishawanavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawanavro|shawanavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawanavnkro|goshawanavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawanavro|gokishawanavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawanavmu|shawanavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawanavnkmu|goshawanavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawanavmu|gokishawanavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawanavsher|shawanavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawanavnksher|goshawanavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawanavsher|gokishawanavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawanavng|shawanavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawanavnkng|goshawanavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawanavng|gokishawanavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawanavya|shawanavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawanavnkya|goshawanavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawanavya|gokishawanavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawanavyam|shawanavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawanavnkyam|goshawanavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawanavyam|gokishawanavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawanavnĂŒshĂ«|shawanavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawanavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawanavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawanavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawanavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawanavnĂŒro|shawanavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawanavnknĂŒro|goshawanavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawanavnĂŒro|gokishawanavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawanavnĂŒmu|shawanavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawanavnknĂŒmu|goshawanavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawanavnĂŒmu|gokishawanavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawanavshĂ«nĂŒ|shawanavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawanavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawanavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawanavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawanavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawanavshĂ«ro|shawanavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawanavnkshĂ«ro|goshawanavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawanavshĂ«ro|gokishawanavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawanavshĂ«mu|shawanavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawanavnkshĂ«mu|goshawanavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawanavshĂ«mu|gokishawanavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawanavronĂŒ|shawanavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawanavnkronĂŒ|goshawanavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawanavronĂŒ|gokishawanavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawanavroshĂ«|shawanavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawanavnkroshĂ«|goshawanavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawanavroshĂ«|gokishawanavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawanavromu|shawanavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawanavnkromu|goshawanavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawanavromu|gokishawanavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawanavmunĂŒ|shawanavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawanavnkmunĂŒ|goshawanavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawanavmunĂŒ|gokishawanavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawanavmushĂ«|shawanavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawanavnkmushĂ«|goshawanavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawanavmushĂ«|gokishawanavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawanavmuro|shawanavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawanavnkmuro|goshawanavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawanavmuro|gokishawanavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
